tagline: See bugs the way users do.

designSystem.style: Modern developer tool aesthetic with a vibrant violet-to-cyan gradient brand, clean card-based layouts, dark and light mode polish, and confidence-driven data visualization for incident triage

screens: Feed — searchable incident list with severity filters, bookmarks, and affected-user counts
Incidents — full incident detail card with device context, root-cause hypothesis, timeline preview, and quick actions
Replay — step-by-step animated timeline playback with play/pause/step controls and progress bar
Settings — developer profile, connected apps, preferences, and light/dark theme toggle
